situation: A software team is debating how to handle a production bug.
option_a: Roll back the entire deployment immediately.
option_b: Leave the buggy code in production and fix it in the next sprint.

situation: A company is deciding how to respond to declining sales.
option_a: Cut all marketing spend to reduce costs.
option_b: Double the marketing budget to drive growth.

situation: A student struggling with a difficult course must choose.
option_b: Continue alone without seeking any help.

situation: A government is formulating policy on data privacy.
option_a: Allow companies unrestricted access to all user data.
option_b: Ban all data collection by private companies.

situation: An engineer is evaluating system reliability requirements.
option_a: Build for 100% uptime with unlimited budget.
option_b: Accept frequent outages to keep infrastructure costs near zero.
